name: Mark-to-Market Election for Marketable Stock

eligibility.description: Applies only to 'marketable stock' (regularly traded on registered exchanges) in a PFIC.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to recognize gain or loss annually based on the fair market value of marketable PFIC stock, avoiding the Section 1291 interest charge and allowing ordinary loss deductions.
